reasoning: MCPB (4-(4-chloro-2-methylphenoxy)butanoic acid) is an aryloxy carboxylic acid herbicide where a chloromethylphenoxy group is linked to a butyric acid chain, making it structurally related to phenoxyacetic acid derivatives (phenoxyalkanoic acids). It contains a chlorinated phenoxy group attached to a carboxylic acid via a butanoic acid chain.
